productDisplayName: Palm Tree Boys Check Red Shirt
description: Composition Red and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, short sleeves with buttoned flaps on the cuffs, buttoned placket on the front, two patch pockets on the front with buttoned flaps, brand name printed on the left pocket, printed branding on the upper back and curved hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours and mild detergent Wash/dry inside out Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decoration Remove all detachable accessories before washing boys will love this shirt from palm tree. The patch pockets on the front and the brand detailing adds to the cool vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and comfy footwear for a stylish, casual look.
